content.text:
---

**Troubleshooting Reply:**

> Hi team,
> 
> Root cause identified: yesterday's retry storm coincided with your credential rotation. Our integration continued using the old secret for ~18 minutes, causing auth failures that triggered exponential backoff retries. The tenant was always reachable; the auth layer just rejected the stale creds until we reloaded the updated secret.
> 
> The API key on our side: `[REDACTED_API_KEY]` (first 12 chars). Full key available if needed.
> 
> Is this tenant (`redwood`) showing any anomalies on your end during the rotation window? If the key looks recently rotated, let us know and we can align our rotation detection to avoid the retry loop next time.

---

Does this work, or do you want me to adjust the tone or add anything?
